description: In this episode, Wee Joe, the Chief Financial Officer of Binance, introduces Ed Tolson, founder of KBIT, a high-frequency trading firm focused on crypto and derivatives. Ed discusses his background in computer science from MIT and his 20 years in quantitative trading, emphasizing the evolution of high-frequency trading and its impact on equity markets.
topic_summary: Wee Joe interviews Ed Tolson about high-frequency trading in crypto and equity markets, covering Ed's background, the evolution of trading strategies, and the role of technology in modern trading practices [t=0:00].
